In rerun::external::eframe::egui_wgpu::wgpu::wgc::binding_model

rerun::external::eframe::egui_wgpu::wgpu::wgc::binding_model

Type Alias ResolvedBindGroupDescriptor

pub type ResolvedBindGroupDescriptor<'a> = BindGroupDescriptor<'a, Arc<BindGroupLayout>, Arc<Buffer>, Arc<Sampler>, Arc<TextureView>, Arc<Tlas>>;
Expand description

cbindgen:ignore

Aliased Type§

struct ResolvedBindGroupDescriptor<'a> {
    pub label: Option<Cow<'a, str>>,
    pub layout: Arc<BindGroupLayout>,
    pub entries: Cow<'a, [BindGroupEntry<'a, Arc<Buffer>, Arc<Sampler>, Arc<TextureView>, Arc<Tlas>>]>,
}

Fields§

§label: Option<Cow<'a, str>>

Debug label of the bind group.

This will show up in graphics debuggers for easy identification.

§layout: Arc<BindGroupLayout>

The BindGroupLayout that corresponds to this bind group.

§entries: Cow<'a, [BindGroupEntry<'a, Arc<Buffer>, Arc<Sampler>, Arc<TextureView>, Arc<Tlas>>]>

The resources to bind to this bind group.
